raw.n: JPMorgan Prime Money Market Fund Class IM

holdings.n: JPMorgan Prime Money Market Fund Class IM

holdings.infoBox: HEQQ is an equity ETF with a total of 107 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 9.18%, Apple at 7.92%, Alphabet at 6.92%, Micron Technology at 6.56%, and Microsoft at 5.55%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Nasdaq Hedged Equity Laddered Overlay ETF (HEQQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund seeks capital appreciation through an actively managed portfolio of US large-cap companies listed on the NASDAQ Stock market with a laddered options overlay strategy. The funds objective is to lower market volatility and competitive risk-adjusted returns. HEQQ was launched on Sep 28, 2023 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
